prompt: I want to add bluetooth support to scan nearby devices — will that work in Expo Go?

assertions.text: Clearly states that Bluetooth (BLE) does NOT work in Expo Go
Explains why — native module not included in Expo Go's fixed module set
Recommends switching to a development build (expo-dev-client)
Provides specific steps to create a dev build (install expo-dev-client, eas build commands)
Names a specific BLE library (e.g., react-native-ble-plx)
